subcodes.first_line: We have promised thee the Tablet, and have sent down unto thee that which shall gladden the eyes of the dwellers of the Most Exalted Paradise. Render thou thanks unto thy Lord, then [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا وعدناک باللوح و انزلنا لک ما تقر به عیون اهل فردوسی الاعلی ان احمد ربک ثم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
